evidence_quotes.quote: This Initiative is to make sure that when a consumer buys a product, in this case a video game that consumer gets to keep that product and prevents the publisher from remotely disabling this product in the future.

paragraphs.text: Due to the on-going European Citizens' Initiative "Stop Destroying Videogames" I noticed how both objectives are aligned. This Initiative is to make sure that when a consumer buys a product, in this case a video game that consumer gets to keep that product and prevents the publisher from remotely disabling this product in the future. See the 2014 video game "The Crew" by Ubisoft. I would hope that you would consider adding videogame protection as to prevent the malpractice of disabling a product a consumer payed for and owns.
